name: telegram-codex
description: Telegram bridge for OpenAI Codex CLI: DM or group-chat your Codex session, get turn-complete pings, and approve risky commands from your phone.

interface.shortDescription: Steer Codex from Telegram: chat, turn pings, and command approvals.
interface.longDescription: Bridge OpenAI Codex to a Telegram bot. Codex can wait for your messages, reply, edit prior messages, react, and pull attachments, so you can drive a session from your phone. Optional hooks ping you when a turn completes and route risky-command approvals to inline allow/deny buttons. Access is allowlisted per user and per group. Requires a Telegram bot token and the Bun runtime.
defaultPrompt: Wait for a Telegram message, then act on it.
Ping me on Telegram when this turn is done.
Ask me on Telegram before running anything risky.
